evals.prompt: Create a rating pitch deck for Boeing Company in the Aerospace/Defense sector
evals.expected_output: An editable rating_pitch.pptx (>=500KB, ~20+ slides) built from the Moody's 2026 Corp template via scripts/build_pptx.py, plus the resolved payload.json saved alongside it under ~/Desktop/rating-pitch/<company>-<YYYYMMDD-HHMMSS>/. The deck covers cover, 3-part structure (Sector / Company / Peers), macro GDP table, rating actions, SWOT (4 quadrants), key metrics charts, peer summary/financials/debt/profitability/scatter tables, scorecard, ESG, and sources.
assertions: PowerPoint file built from Moody's corporate template (>= 500 KB)
payload.json matches the skill schema (report_date, target_company, sector, currency, companies, sources, sections)
payload.sections.swot has >= 2 items in each of strengths/weaknesses/opportunities/threats

evals.prompt: I need a rating pitch for Tesla Inc. — sector is Automotive. Use USD and compare against 6 peers
evals.expected_output: Same structural requirements as eval-1, with 6 peers (not 5) resolved via getEntityPeers, USD honored in payload.currency, and peer tables / scatters reflecting 6 comparators. Tests natural-language phrasing + parameter handling (currency, peer count).
assertions: PowerPoint file built from Moody's corporate template (>= 500 KB)
payload.companies has >= 6 entries (target + 6 peers, target first)
payload.sections.swot has >= 2 items in each of strengths/weaknesses/opportunities/threats

evals.prompt: Generate a credit pitch deck for JPMorgan Chase, Banking sector
evals.expected_output: Same structural requirements as eval-1, applied to a financial-institution target where bank-specific credit metrics (deposits, capital ratios) substitute for generic Debt/EBITDA. Tests sector flex (Banking vs A&D/Auto).
assertions: PowerPoint file built from Moody's corporate template (>= 500 KB)
payload.sections.swot has >= 2 items in each of strengths/weaknesses/opportunities/threats
